summary: Iteration 3 — Full backend + frontend validation for the new /products page, eco-grading-system section, downloadable spec-sheet PDFs, and regression of contact form / nav / WhatsApp / About. ALL CHECKS PASS. Backend: 19/19 pytest cases green (incl. 9 new grades + PDF cases). Frontend: 14/14 Playwright assertions green on the public preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py PDF endpoint correctly streams with Content-Disposition: attachment and filename; verified via curl on all 3 slugs (HTTP 200, application/pdf, %PDF magic bytes).
GRADES dict is hard-coded in server.py — fine for an MVP brochure site, but if marketing wants to edit copy without a deploy, move it to a JSON/DB-backed source later.
Products.jsx is ~570 lines (single file). Still readable, but the GradeBlock subcomponent could be split into its own module before the page grows further.
Both Home.jsx and Products.jsx duplicate the gradingCriteria array. Consider extracting to /constants/grading.js to keep wording in sync.
PDF endpoint regenerates the PDF on every request with reportlab — acceptable now (<3.6KB, fast), but consider caching the bytes (e.g., functools.lru_cache on _build_spec_pdf) for production traffic.
Comparison table renders 8 rows with column-per-grade as required; rows use slugified data-testid via PRODUCTS.comparisonRow(...) — good.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (added TestGradesList, TestGradeDetail, TestSpecSheetPdf — 9 new cases, parametrised)
seed_data_creation: A few TEST_-prefixed contact submissions were created against MongoDB during regression (happy-path verification). No cleanup endpoint exists.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 ships cleanly. The new /products page, eco-grading section, 4 criterion cards on both Home and Products, 3 grade blocks, comparison table (8 rows x 4 cols), and reportlab-generated PDFs (all 3 slugs verified via curl + Playwright href check) all work. DOM ordering rule is satisfied on both pages — eco-grading section precedes the products section/first grade block. Contact form, nav (incl. new Products link), WhatsApp FAB (wa.me/6281228446702), and About page all regress green. No outstanding bugs.
rca of the issue: n/a — no bugs found this iteration. Note: a HEAD (curl -I) on /api/grades/{slug}/spec-sheet.pdf returns 405 because the route is GET-only; this is expected FastAPI behaviour and not a bug. GET works and returns valid PDFs.
